identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a diplomatic, authoritative, and emotionally resonant interface for a global NGO.

visual_language.emotional_tone: Authoritative, Trustworthy, Global, Culturally Rooted, Transparent

primary.name: Diplomatic Navy
primary.description: Deep, stable, infinite. Used for primary actions, footers, and strong headers.

secondary.name: Sovereign Gold
secondary.description: Prestige and heritage. Used sparingly for accents, borders, and active states. NOT for main backgrounds.

background.name: Embassy White
background.description: Clean, neutral, spacious. Not stark white (#FFFFFF), but a very subtle off-white to reduce eye strain.

headings.description: Traditional serif fonts that convey established authority and history.

body.description: Clean, highly readable sans-serif for long-form policy documents and descriptions.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-sm hover:bg-primary/90 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-semibold px-8 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-white transition-all duration-300 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-semibold px-8 py-3
buttons.ghost: text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-semibold

cards.style: bg-white border border-border/40 rounded-sm hover:border-secondary/50 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.style: bg-white border-input rounded-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-secondary focus:border-secondary transition-all

navigation.style: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-border/40 sticky top-0 z-50
navigation.link_style: text-sm font-medium text-primary/80 hover:text-primary transition-colors uppercase tracking-wider

bento_grid.description: Use for 'Focus Areas' and 'Impact' sections to create visual interest.

hero_section.description: Full-width immersive background with heavy overlay for text readability. Center-aligned text for maximum gravitas.
hero_section.classes: relative min-h-[80vh] flex items-center justify-center text-center overflow-hidden

split_screen.description: Use for 'About' and 'Leadership' introductions. 50% image, 50% text.

hero_backgrounds.description: National flags outdoors - Excellent for 'Global Presence' or Hero background.
Abstract global sphere - High tech, suitable for 'Research' or 'Network' sections.
Black background with yellow lines - Strong contrast for a 'Data' or 'Statistics' section.

cultural_elements.description: Ornate gold decorations - Perfect for 'Cultural Diplomacy' background or accent.
Woman in white sari (Mudra) - Elegant, suitable for 'Arts' or 'Heritage' sub-sections.

leadership_people.description: Man in suit arms crossed - Use for 'Founder' or 'Chairman'.
Woman in purple sari - Use for 'Advisory Board' or 'Director'.
Woman in pink blazer - Use for 'Country Coordinator'.

business_meetings.description: Meeting table - Use for 'Programs' or 'Policy Dialogue' section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Create a 'Layout' component that wraps all pages with the Navigation and Footer.
Ensure the Footer is massive (py-20) with a dark Navy background and Gold text accents.
Use 'Playfair Display' for all H1-H3 headings. Use 'Inter' for body text.
Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle textures (noise/grain).
Forms must have a 'Diplomatic' feel: sharp corners, minimal borders, clear labels.
Use the provided image URLs strictly. Do not use placeholders.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' for the 'Focus Areas' section on the Home page.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 🧠 💭 💡 🔮 🎯 📚 🎭 🎬 🎪 🎉 🎊 🎁 🎀 🎂 🍰 🎈 🎨 🎰 💰 💵 💳 🏦 💎 🪙 💸 🤑 📊 📈 📉 💹 🔢 🏆 🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
